records.question: What were our total store sales?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) FROM store_sales;

records.question: What were our total store sales by item category?

trace.sql: SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) as total_sales FROM store_sales ss JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk GROUP BY i.i_category ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

records.question: What are our net store sales after returns, broken down by item?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    i.i_item_id, 
    i.i_item_desc,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) as total_sales
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_item_id, i.i_item_desc
LIMIT 5;

SELECT i_item_id, sum(ss_net_paid) - coalesce(sum(sr_return_amt), 0) FROM store_sales left join store_returns on ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number join item on ss_item_sk = i_item_sk group by i_item_id limit 10;
SELECT sum(ss_ext_sales_price - coalesce(sr_return_amt,0)) FROM store_sales left join store_returns on ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number;

SELECT i_item_id, item.i_item_desc, item.i_current_price, item.i_class, item.i_category, SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) as store_sales, SUM(sr_return_amt) as store_returns, SUM(ss_net_paid - coalesce(sr_return_amt, 0)) as net_paid FROM store_sales JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk GROUP BY i_item_id, item.i_item_desc, item.i_current_price, item.i_class, item.i_category ORDER BY i_item_id LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(sales - returns) as net_sales
FROM (
    SELECT ss_item_sk as item_sk, ss_net_paid as sales, 0 as returns FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT sr_item_sk as item_sk, 0 as sales, sr_net_loss as returns FROM store_returns
) t
JOIN item i ON t.item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id
ORDER BY i_item_id
LIMIT 5;

records.question: How much did customers return, in dollars, by store?

trace.sql: SELECT s.s_store_name, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) as total_return_amount FROM store_returns sr JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk GROUP BY s.s_store_name ORDER BY total_return_amount DESC;

records.question: What were our total store sales and total returns for each item category?

trace.sql:
WITH sales AS (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) as total_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
), returns AS (
    SELECT i.i_category, SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) as total_returns
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_category
)
SELECT sales.i_category, sales.total_sales, returns.total_returns
FROM sales
FULL OUTER JOIN returns ON sales.i_category = returns.i_category
ORDER BY sales.i_category;

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) as total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
),
returns AS (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) as total_returns
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
)
SELECT i.i_category, SUM(total_sales), SUM(total_returns)
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN sales ON i.i_item_sk = sales.ss_item_sk
LEFT JOIN returns ON i.i_item_sk = returns.sr_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_category
ORDER BY i.i_category;

records.question: Which items were returned the most, compared with how many were sold?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    i.i_item_id, 
    i.i_item_desc, 
    SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned, 
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_sold,
    CAST(SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS FLOAT) / CAST(SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS FLOAT) AS return_ratio
FROM item i
JOIN store_sales ss ON i.i_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
JOIN store_returns sr ON i.i_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
GROUP BY i.i_item_id, i.i_item_desc
ORDER BY return_ratio DESC, total_returned DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT 
        i.i_item_id,
        i.i_item_desc,
        SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_sold
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id, i.i_item_desc
),
returns AS (
    SELECT 
        i.i_item_id,
        SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
)
SELECT 
    s.i_item_id,
    s.i_item_desc,
    r.total_returned,
    s.total_sold,
    CAST(r.total_returned AS FLOAT) / s.total_sold AS return_ratio
FROM sales s
JOIN returns r ON s.i_item_id = r.i_item_id
ORDER BY return_ratio DESC, r.total_returned DESC, s.i_item_id
LIMIT 5;

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) AS total_sold
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_item_sk
),
returns AS (
    SELECT sr_item_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS total_returned
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    i.i_item_id,
    i.i_item_desc,
    SUM(r.total_returned) as total_returned,
    SUM(s.total_sold) as total_sold,
    CAST(SUM(r.total_returned) AS FLOAT) / SUM(s.total_sold) AS return_ratio
FROM item i
JOIN sales s ON i.i_item_sk = s.ss_item_sk
JOIN returns r ON i.i_item_sk = r.sr_item_sk
GROUP BY i.i_item_id, i.i_item_desc
ORDER BY return_ratio DESC, total_returned DESC, i.i_item_id
LIMIT 5;

records.question: What were our store sales in the year 2001?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), SUM(ss_net_paid), SUM(ss_sales_price) FROM store_sales JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk WHERE d_year = 2001;

records.question: What is the average sales price per item?

trace.sql: SELECT AVG(ss_sales_price) FROM store_sales;
SELECT SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) / SUM(ss_quantity) FROM store_sales;

records.question: What is our net store revenue (sales minus returns) per customer?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT sum(ss_net_paid) FROM store_sales) as total_sales,
  (SELECT sum(sr_return_amt) FROM store_returns) as total_returns,
  (SELECT count(distinct c_customer_sk) FROM customer) as total_customers

WITH customer_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk as c_customer_sk, SUM(ss_net_paid) as total_sales
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk
),
customer_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk as c_customer_sk, SUM(sr_return_amt) as total_returns
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk
),
customer_net AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) - COALESCE(r.total_returns, 0) as net_revenue
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN customer_sales s ON c.c_customer_sk = s.c_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN customer_returns r ON c.c_customer_sk = r.c_customer_sk
)
SELECT AVG(net_revenue) as net_revenue_per_customer
FROM customer_net;

SELECT 
  (SUM(COALESCE(ss_net_paid, 0)) - (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(sr_return_amt, 0)) FROM store_returns)) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c_customer_sk) FROM customer) 
FROM store_sales
SELECT count(distinct ss_customer_sk) FROM store_sales
SELECT sum(ss_ext_sales_price) FROM store_sales

records.question: How many separate item returns were recorded?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_returns

records.question: What were our total store sales by state?

trace.sql:
SELECT
    s_state,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) as total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
GROUP BY s_state
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

records.question: What is our total store sales revenue including tax?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(ss_net_paid_inc_tax), SUM(ss_ext_sales_price + ss_ext_tax) FROM store_sales
SELECT ss_quantity, ss_sales_price, ss_ext_sales_price, ss_ext_discount_amt, ss_ext_tax, ss_coupon_amt, ss_net_paid, ss_net_paid_inc_tax FROM store_sales LIMIT 5;

records.question: What is the total quantity of items sold and returned, per store?

trace.sql:
WITH sales as (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) as total_sold 
    FROM store_sales 
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
),
returns as (
    SELECT sr_store_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) as total_returned 
    FROM store_returns 
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
)
SELECT s_store_id, total_sold, total_returned, total_sold + COALESCE(total_returned, 0) as combined
FROM store s
LEFT JOIN sales ON s.s_store_sk = sales.ss_store_sk
LEFT JOIN returns ON s.s_store_sk = returns.sr_store_sk
ORDER BY s_store_id

SELECT s_store_id, SUM(ss_quantity) total_sold_qty, SUM(sr_return_quantity) total_returned_qty
FROM store s
JOIN store_sales ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
GROUP BY s_store_id;

WITH sales as (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) as total_sold 
    FROM store_sales 
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
),
returns as (
    SELECT sr_store_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) as total_returned 
    FROM store_returns 
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
)
SELECT s_store_id, SUM(total_sold) as sold, SUM(total_returned) as returned
FROM store s
LEFT JOIN sales ON s.s_store_sk = sales.ss_store_sk
LEFT JOIN returns ON s.s_store_sk = returns.sr_store_sk
GROUP BY s_store_id
ORDER BY s_store_id

records.question: Which state had the highest return rate?

trace.sql:
SELECT 
    s.s_state, 
    SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) AS return_qty,
    SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS sales_qty,
    COUNT(sr.sr_item_sk) AS return_cnt,
    COUNT(ss.ss_item_sk) AS sales_cnt,
    SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS return_amt,
    SUM(ss.ss_net_paid) AS sales_amt
FROM store s
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr ON s.s_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
LIMIT 5;

WITH state_returns AS (
    SELECT s.s_state, COUNT(sr.sr_ticket_number) as return_cnt, SUM(sr.sr_return_quantity) as return_qty
    FROM store s
    JOIN store_returns sr ON s.s_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
    GROUP BY s.s_state
),
state_sales AS (
    SELECT s.s_state, COUNT(ss.ss_ticket_number) as sales_cnt, SUM(ss.ss_quantity) as sales_qty
    FROM store s
    JOIN store_sales ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
    GROUP BY s.s_state
)
SELECT r.s_state,
       r.return_cnt * 1.0 / s.sales_cnt as return_rate_cnt,
       r.return_qty * 1.0 / s.sales_qty as return_rate_qty
FROM state_returns r
JOIN state_sales s ON r.s_state = s.s_state
ORDER BY return_rate_cnt DESC, return_rate_qty DESC;

WITH sr AS (
    SELECT sr_store_sk, SUM(sr_return_quantity) as ret_qty
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
),
ss AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, SUM(ss_quantity) as sales_qty
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
)
SELECT s.s_state, 
       SUM(sr.ret_qty)*1.0 / SUM(ss.sales_qty) as return_rate
FROM store s
JOIN sr ON s.s_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
JOIN ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH sr AS (
    SELECT sr_store_sk, COUNT(sr_ticket_number) as ret_cnt
    FROM store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
),
ss AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, COUNT(ss_ticket_number) as sales_cnt
    FROM store_sales
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
)
SELECT s.s_state, 
       SUM(sr.ret_cnt)*1.0 / SUM(ss.sales_cnt) as return_rate
FROM store s
JOIN sr ON s.s_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
JOIN ss ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
GROUP BY s.s_state
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;
